promotion_guardrail: Proposal-side only. Do not promote to A2-1 kernel law from this batch without a later explicit selective promotion pass.

selection_basis.queue_reason: Selected as the next strong sims intake batch after the history-strip provenance-asymmetry reduction and as the next raw-order operator-role harness before the deferred sim_suite_v1 descendant bundle.
selection_basis.parent_reason: The parent batch already isolates the exact seams needed for second-pass reduction: standalone harness identity, placeholder-role fencing, local-versus-top-level evidence separation, separate operator4 descendant status, current evidence-hash versus current-emitter mismatch, and harness-schema drift.
selection_basis.comparison_anchor_reason: The sims evidence-boundary reduction was used for the nearest evidence-admission comparison, the history-strip reduction was used for the nearest catalog/local-output versus top-level-admission caution, and the sim_suite_v1 descendant bundle was used for the nearest mixed bundle-provenance comparison around the current run_sim_suite_v1 hash.

deferred_alternatives.reason: Deferred to the next bounded step because the parent batch explicitly preserves sim_suite_v1 as the next separate raw-order family.
Not selected because this thread prefers existing intake artifacts over raw-source rereads unless a parent batch proves insufficient.

raw_source_reread_reason: The parent oprole8 intake batch plus the existing sims evidence-boundary, history-strip reduction, and sim_suite_v1 descendant-bundle intake anchor were sufficient to isolate harness identity, placeholder-role fences, admission gaps, descendant separation, and provenance mismatch.

candidate_items.name: OPROLE8_STANDALONE_HARNESS_MICROFAMILY_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves oprole8 as a small standalone harness family rather than a bundle or current descendant suite.

candidate_items.name: PLACEHOLDER_R1_TO_R4_NOT_FINAL_OPERATOR_TAXONOMY_FENCE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the explicit harness disclaimer against treating placeholder roles as final TI/TE/FI/FE ontology.

candidate_items.name: OPROLE8_LOCAL_EVIDENCE_NOT_REPOTOP_ADMISSION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the harness visibility layers without overstating repo-top evidence status.

candidate_items.name: OPROLE8_HARNESS_TO_OPERATOR4_DESCENDANT_SEPARATION_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the operator4 surface as a separate descendant-like suite rather than a clean rename of oprole8.

candidate_items.name: OPERATOR4_DESCENDANT_EVIDENCE_HASH_NOT_CURRENT_EMITTER_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the strongest provenance contradiction in the operator-role seam by separating current evidence-hash attribution from the current emitter path.

candidate_items.name: OPROLE8_HARNESS_SCHEMA_AND_ROLE_BEHAVIOR_SEAM_RULE
candidate_items.why_candidate: Preserves the harness-local schema and role-behavior seam before later operator-role mappings flatten it.

quarantined_items.name: R1_TO_R4_AS_FINAL_TI_TE_FI_FE_ONTOLOGY
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves a harness disclaimer against importing final operator-role ontology into oprole8.

quarantined_items.name: CATALOG_COLOCATION_AS_ONE_CLEAN_RENAME_CHAIN
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Catalog co-location is weaker than lineage identity and does not erase the contract or schema split.

quarantined_items.name: LOCAL_OPROLE8_EVIDENCE_AS_TOPLEVEL_EVIDENCED_STATUS
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Local harness evidence does not by itself yield current repo-top evidence admission.

quarantined_items.name: OPERATOR4_EVIDENCE_BLOCK_AS_CLEAN_CURRENT_PRODUCER_PATH
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: The parent batch explicitly preserves a mismatch between the current evidence-pack code hash and the current emitter path for the operator4 descendant.

quarantined_items.name: SHARED_METRIC_NAMES_AS_SCHEMA_EQUIVALENCE
quarantined_items.why_quarantined: Shared metric labels are too weak to erase nested-versus-flat schema drift and runtime-contract differences.

reasons_for_candidate_status: These candidates isolate the parent batch's strongest reusable packets: standalone harness identity, placeholder-role fencing, local-evidence admission caution, separate operator4 descendant status, current evidence-hash versus current-emitter mismatch, and harness-schema drift.
They preserve oprole8 as a bounded proposal-side micro-family without letting catalog co-location, local evidence, or descendant topic overlap overstate lineage closure.
They remain small, contradiction-preserving, and proposal-side for later operator-role lineage synthesis.
reasons_for_quarantine_status: These items remain ontology overreads, rename overreads, admission overreads, provenance overreads, or schema-equivalence overreads rather than clean reusable A2-2 surfaces.
The parent batch is strong enough to preserve them as warnings, but not to promote them into current law.
notes: Operated from existing intake artifacts after prior required control-surface reads.
Used the sims evidence-boundary reduction, history-strip reduction, and sim_suite_v1 descendant-bundle intake anchor as comparison anchors.
No raw core-doc reread was needed for this bounded oprole8 harness descendant-seam reduction pass.
